title: tillandsia zebrina
intro: Tillandsia zebrina, also known as the Zebra air plant, is a species of epiphytic bromeliad native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It is a type of air plant that obtains moisture and nutrients from the air, water, and debris that accumulates on its leaves, rather than through a traditional root system. Tillandsia zebrina has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, and its extracts have been shown to have antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to take advantage of its health benefits, including its potential to improve respiratory health and boost the immune system.
